channel.title: E Hoque on SBMARUF
channel.description: Recent content in E Hoque on SBMARUF

item.title: BenLLM-Eval: A Comprehensive Evaluation into the Potentials and Pitfalls of Large Language Models on Bengali NLP
item.description: Comprehensive evaluation of LLMs on Bengali NLP, examining potentials and pitfalls for low-resource language processing.
